description.zh: 蚂蚁集团推出的企业级设计系统，提供完整的设计规范、资源沉淀与高质量 React 组件生态，也覆盖部分 Vue 社区实现。
description.en: An enterprise-oriented design system from Ant Group with comprehensive guidelines, design assets, and a mature React component ecosystem, plus related Vue community implementations.

description.zh: 面向 Vue 3 的主流组件库与设计语言，强调开箱即用、组件完整和后台系统开发效率，适合中后台与内容型站点。
description.en: A mainstream Vue 3 component library and design language focused on ready-to-use building blocks, broad component coverage, and productivity for admin and content-heavy products.

description.zh: Atlassian 官方设计系统，为 Jira、Confluence 等产品统一视觉语言、设计原则、内容规范与前端实现模式。
description.en: Atlassian's official design system that aligns visual language, principles, content guidance, and implementation patterns across products like Jira and Confluence.

description.zh: 建立在 Radix 与 Tailwind 之上的现代组件集合，强调可复制、可组合、可深度定制，适合快速搭建定制化 React 界面。
description.en: A modern component collection built on Radix and Tailwind, optimized for copy-paste workflows, composability, and deep customization in React products.
